questions.question: What are the primary sources of fluoride in drinking water, and how can they affect human health?
questions.hint: Explain the sources and health impacts of fluoride in drinking water

questions.question: Describe the effects of excessive fluoride consumption on dental and skeletal health. Are there any recommended guidelines for fluoride levels in drinking water?
questions.hint: Explain the health effects of fluoride and relevant guidelines

questions.question: How can communities implement measures to reduce fluoride levels in their drinking water, such as alternative water sources or treatment methods? What are the advantages and disadvantages of each approach?
questions.hint: Compare the pros and cons of different approaches
